claimBoundary: This is an internal DSXU replay contract hit-rate gate. It may support DSXU internal V6 readiness, but it is not a public external benchmark, not a real live-model ability score, and not a claim that DSXU beats named external proprietary coding assistants without paired external raw evidence.
dataStillNeeded: External target/reference paired raw transcripts are still required before any public external comparison claim.
Live provider/TUI acceptance must rerun before release if route, tool, prompt, or TUI owners change.
Cache hit rate remains an observed optimization metric; publish exact values only.
